name: /import-eslint-config attempts a direct mapping for a rule that is named identically in our registry
command: printf '{"rules":{"no-eval":"error"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" .eslintrc --mapping-stub direct-match --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'no-eval: direct-match' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
